## What changed

Briefly describe the problem and the solution.

## How it was tested

- [ ] I ran `sh ./scripts/test.sh`
- [ ] I ran `node self-test.mjs`
- [ ] I ran `node integration-test.mjs`
- [ ] I ran `node inject.mjs --dry-run`
- [ ] I manually checked RTL text alongside LTR code when the change affects rendering

## Safety checks

- [ ] The change does not transmit conversation content or telemetry.
- [ ] The change does not modify files inside `ChatGPT.app`.
- [ ] The change does not allow DevTools connections outside loopback.
